parameters-en.Low Gain: Adjusts the gain of the low-frequency band.
parameters-en.Mid Freq: Sets the frequency for the mid-frequency band.
parameters-en.Mid Gain: Adjusts the gain of the mid-frequency band.
parameters-en.High Gain: Adjusts the gain of the high-frequency band.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level or gain of the equalizer.
